tasks.label: dev: up
git: rebase UI branches onto local main
args:
set -euo pipefail
current_branch=$(git branch --show-current)
if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
  echo "Working tree has uncommitted changes; commit or stash before rebasing UI branches." >&2
  exit 1
fi
for branch in UI-A UI-B UI-C; do
  echo "==> Rebasing ${branch} onto local main"
  git switch "${branch}"
  git rebase main
done
if [ -n "${current_branch}" ]; then
  git switch "${current_branch}"
fi

tasks.label: git: force push UI branches
args:
set -euo pipefail
for branch in UI-A UI-B UI-C; do
  echo "==> Force pushing ${branch} to origin/${branch}"
  git push --force-with-lease origin "${branch}:${branch}"
done

tasks.label: git: commit staged changes to main (no push)

inputs.description: Select the UI scheme to open in the local dev flow
Commit message (commits staged changes to local main, clears matching current-branch changes; does not push)
